name: The Back Nine Golf | Hudson, WI
about: The Back Nine Golf in Hudson, WI is a golf simulation venue. The facility offers golfers an indoor experience to play and practice. The specific technology and amenities available are not detailed on the accessible portions of the website. Pricing details are not currently available online.
why_golfers_like_it: Suitable for both practice and play
Venue capable of hosting leagues and corporate events
